full_text:
Zhou Chu (Ziyin) 周處 (子隱)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Chu (周處), styledZiyin (子隱), was born in from Yangxian in Eastern Wu’s Wu county. A notorious youth who reformed himself. A popular offical, he died heroically against the Qiang. Zhou Chu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Zhou Chu lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
